videos.title: JUST IN: Iran says it's halting attacks on Israel after overnight strikes
videos.author: Fox News
videos.description:
Chief foreign correspondent Trey Yingst reports after the Iran's IRGC announced a temporary halt to its missile attacks on Israel following a sharp warning from President Donald Trump.
